VAL-MPB-001.evidence: Table provider_connections exists with all required columns: id (UUID PK, gen_random_uuid()), user_id (VARCHAR(64) FK->users ON DELETE CASCADE), provider (VARCHAR(32)), auth_type (VARCHAR(16)), auth_enc (BYTEA NOT NULL), token_expires_at (TIMESTAMPTZ), status (VARCHAR(16) default 'active'), last_sync_at (TIMESTAMPTZ), daily_cursor (VARCHAR(256)), series_cursor (VARCHAR(256)), periods_cursor (VARCHAR(256)), sync_status (VARCHAR(16) default 'idle'), sync_error (TEXT), created_at (TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL default now()), updated_at (TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL default now()). UNIQUE constraint 'uq_provider_connections_user_provider' on (user_id, provider) confirmed. Additional indexes: idx_provider_connections_active_sync, idx_provider_connections_token_expiry, idx_provider_connections_user_id.

VAL-MPB-002.evidence: Table health_data_daily exists with columns: id (BIGINT PK), user_id (VARCHAR(64) FK->users), metric_type (VARCHAR(64)), date (DATE), value_encrypted (BYTEA), source (VARCHAR(32)), source_id (VARCHAR(256)), imported_at (TIMESTAMPTZ default now()). UNIQUE on (user_id, metric_type, date, source). Old table 'health_data' does NOT exist (information_schema query returned false). Data preserved: 4008 rows present in health_data_daily.

VAL-MPB-003.evidence: Table health_data_series is a partitioned table with PARTITION BY RANGE (recorded_at). Composite PK on (id, recorded_at) confirmed. 48 monthly child partitions exist (2024-01 through 2027-12) plus health_data_series_default partition. Columns: id (BIGINT), user_id (VARCHAR(64)), metric_type (VARCHAR(64)), recorded_at (TIMESTAMPTZ), value_encrypted (BYTEA), source (VARCHAR(32)), source_id (VARCHAR(256)), imported_at (TIMESTAMPTZ). UNIQUE on (user_id, metric_type, recorded_at, source).

VAL-MPB-004.evidence: Table health_data_periods exists with columns: id (BIGINT PK), user_id (VARCHAR(64) FK->users ON DELETE CASCADE), event_type (VARCHAR(64)), subtype (VARCHAR(64) nullable), started_at (TIMESTAMPTZ), ended_at (TIMESTAMPTZ), duration_sec (INTEGER, generated always as EXTRACT(epoch FROM ended_at - started_at)::integer stored), metadata_enc (BYTEA nullable), source (VARCHAR(32)), source_id (VARCHAR(256)), imported_at (TIMESTAMPTZ default now()). UNIQUE constraint 'uq_periods_user_type_start_source' on (user_id, event_type, started_at, source). CHECK constraint chk_period_end_after_start ensures ended_at > started_at. GiST index on (user_id, tstzrange(started_at, ended_at)). Note: contract specifies 'created_at' but table uses 'imported_at' — consistent with health_data_daily and health_data_series naming convention.

VAL-MPB-005.evidence: Table metric_source_preferences exists with composite PK on (user_id, metric_type) as 'metric_source_preferences_pkey'. Columns: user_id (VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL), metric_type (VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL), provider (VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL), updated_at (TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL default now()). FK constraint metric_source_preferences_user_id_fkey -> users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE.

VAL-MPB-006.evidence: SELECT count(*) FROM provider_connections WHERE provider='oura' returned 10 rows. Oura connections are present in provider_connections with provider='oura'. The old oura_connections table no longer exists (confirmed separately in VAL-MPB-034), indicating successful migration.

VAL-MPB-031.evidence: All four tables populated with seed data: health_data_daily has 4008 rows, health_data_series has 4080 rows, health_data_periods has 133 rows, provider_connections has 10 rows. All counts > 0 confirming seed script populates all required tables.

VAL-MPB-034.evidence: Query SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name='oura_connections' AND table_schema='public') returned false. The oura_connections table no longer exists in the database.

VAL-MPB-036.evidence: Query SELECT * FROM pg_extension WHERE extname='btree_gist' returned 1 row: oid=16711, extname=btree_gist, extversion=1.7. Extension is enabled and active. Used by idx_periods_user_timerange GiST index on health_data_periods.

VAL-MPB-037.evidence: Today is 2026-03-11. Current month partition health_data_series_2026_03 exists. Three months ahead: 2026_04, 2026_05, 2026_06 all exist. Partitions span from 2024-01 through 2027-12 (48 monthly partitions) plus health_data_series_default. Requirement of current month + 3 months ahead + default is satisfied with significant headroom.

summary: Tested 10 assertions: all 10 passed. Database schema fully matches the multi-provider-backend specification. Tables provider_connections, health_data_daily, health_data_series (range-partitioned), health_data_periods, and metric_source_preferences all exist with correct schemas, constraints, and indexes. Old tables (health_data, oura_connections) removed. btree_gist extension enabled. Seed data populates all tables. Series partitions span 2024-01 through 2027-12 with default.
